     the Fermi energy is    -0.3359 ev

!    total energy              =   -7323.99249792 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          1.1E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.18579777 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =   -7323.80670015 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -148730.40349448 Ry
     hartree contribution      =   75070.75578378 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -2813.78080614 Ry
     ewald contribution        =   69151.08767133 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -1.46585464 Ry
